case_title: EMPIRE PORTFOLIOS, INC. VS. PETER POLICASTRO

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMPIRE PORTFOLIOS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT POLICASTRO, PETER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EMPIRE PORTFOLIOS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLICASTRO, PETER $3,596.73 PRINCIPAL, $2,094.40 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,871.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
ISSUANCE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMPIRE PORTFOLIOS, INC.
